title: Fix external function declarations with class typedef references

features.name: parameterized class with type parameter and extern function
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a type parameter that is used in an extern function declaration

features.name: external function definition with class scope type resolution
features.description: Code should include an external function definition that uses ClassName::Type syntax to resolve a typedef from a parameterized class

features.name: typedef instantiating parameterized class
features.description: Code should include a typedef that instantiates a parameterized class with a specific type
